revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:兵主神社]]
'''Hyōzu Shrine''' (兵主神社) refers to multiple shrines in Japan. {{Citation needed|date=December 2011|dedicated to the guardian of soldiers (tsuwamonogura)}}.
* [[Hyōzu Taisha]] (officially "Hyōzu Shrine") – Located in [[Yasu City]], {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, a former [[Prefectural shrines]] and an [[Shikinaisha|ancient Myōjin Taisha]] listed in the [[Engishiki]]. * {{ill|Anashi-Nimasu Hyōzu Shrine|ja|穴師坐兵主神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anashi-Nimasu Hyōzu Shrine|qq=}} – Located in [[Sakurai City]], {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, a former Prefectural shrine and an ancient Myōjin Taisha listed in the Engishiki. * {{ill|Anashinoohohiyauzuno Shrine|qid=Q135098834|1=Anashinoohohiyauzuno Shrine}}
* {{ill|Hyōzu Shrine (Kishiwada)|ja|兵主神社 (岸和田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzu Shrine (Kishiwada)|qq=}} – Located in [[Nishinomachi]], [[Kishiwada City]], {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, listed in the Engishiki.
* {{ill|Hyōzu Shrine (Tanba)|ja|兵主神社 (丹波市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzu Shrine (Tanba)|qq=}} – Located in [[Tanba City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, a former Prefectural shrine and listed in the Engishiki. * {{ill|Hyōzu Shrine|lt=Hyōzu Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|兵主神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzu Shrine|qq=}} – Located in [[Okazaki, Kuroda, Nishiwaki City]], Hyōgo Prefecture, listed in the Engishiki. * [[Itatehyōzu Shrine|Itate-Hyōzu Shrines]] – Located in [[Himeji City]], Hyōgo Prefecture, a former Prefectural shrine and listed in the Engishiki.
* {{ill|Hyōzu Shrine (Okayama City)|ja|兵主神社 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzu Shrine (Okayama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579139|1=Hyōzu Shrine (Okayama City)}} – Located in [[Azu, Minami Ward, Okayama City]], {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hyōzu Shrine (Iki City)|ja|兵主神社 (壱岐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōzu Shrine (Iki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579143|1=Hyōzu Shrine (Iki City)}} – Located in [[Fukae, Ashibe Town, Iki City]], {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}, a former Prefectural shrine and an ancient Myōjin Taisha listed in the Engishiki.<ref>[[Iki District#Shrines in Iki District|Shrines in Iki District]]</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Kappa|en|Kappa|qid=Q14401|lt=Kappa|1=Kappa}} – A mythical creature mentioned in invocations for warding off kappas. * {{ill|Chiyou|en|Chiyou|qid=Q1147255|lt=Chiyou|1=Chiyou}} – A deity in Chinese mythology, sometimes equated with the Hyōzu deity worshipped in Japanese shrines.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|兵主神社|version=61046981|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:兵主神社]]
